title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: Resilient deployment error recovery, data import safety improvements, and platform stability fixes across Salesforce, HubSpot, and Core.

entries.headline: Resilient deployment error recovery
details: Deploy commands now have a process-level timeout guard (300s default) to prevent indefinite hangs
Pre-deploy check detects in-progress or queued deployments on the target org before starting a new one
Deployment manager uses async polling instead of synchronous waits for all deploy operations
Five new deploy-specific error patterns (timeout, metadata lock, component failure, test failure, queued) with actionable recovery guidance
SOQL field errors now propagate warnings to downstream deploy attempts on the same object
Orphaned deployments are detected and surfaced when the deployment agent stops unexpectedly

entries.headline: Smarter data import safety checks
details: Pre-import flow impact assessment identifies record-triggered flows that will fire on bulk INSERT and estimates side effects
Validation Rule state divergence check compares active VRs in the org against local source XML before imports
Industry-aware fuzzy matching raises thresholds to 0.90+ for property management and similar industries with formulaic company names

entries.headline: Runbook enrichment with assessment findings
details: Runbook synthesizer now accepts supplemental data (--supplemental flag) for detailed assessment findings
Assessment hooks automatically write findings to a supplemental directory for richer runbook synthesis
Google Workspace auth pre-flight check prevents mid-operation token expiry failures

entries.headline: State/Country picklist detection and deploy path enforcement
details: Flow field reference validator now detects State/Country picklist confusion
Deploy hooks enforce permission checks consistently
Orchestrator retry logic improved for multi-step workflows

entries.headline: Routing and hook stability improvements
details: All routing enforcement converted to advisory-only — hooks provide guidance but never block tool execution
Stale marketplace path references replaced across all plugins
Runbook context injection and subagent context loading restored
Startup no longer requires Salesforce CLI alias to be pre-configured

entries.headline: Restore agent launch configuration
details: Fixed missing library-reference.yaml that was preventing HubSpot agent launches

entries.headline: Agent tooling consistency
details: Added Grep capability to 94 agents that previously only had Bash
Removed legacy patterned Bash restrictions from 103 agents
